codeReview.summary: The cleanup removes the Hardhat config files, rewires package scripts and CI to Forge, and leaves the Foundry test suite in place, but it does not fully satisfy the requested Foundry-only cleanup. The commit leaves Hardhat in the committed npm lockfile that CI installs from, and it deletes the gas benchmarking script instead of preserving or migrating that requested live-ops tooling.

issues.description: `package.json` drops Hardhat, but the committed lockfile still declares `@nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox`, `@parity/hardhat-polkadot`, and `hardhat` at the root package (`package-lock.json:20,23,36`). Because `.github/workflows/ci.yml:30` installs with `npm ci`, this feature does not actually remove Hardhat from the dependency graph for clean installs/CI, so the repo is not fully `Foundry-only` as claimed.

The feature brief explicitly said to retain live-operation TypeScript tooling such as gas benchmarks where still needed, but commit `945e6f0` deletes `dualvm/scripts/gasBenchmark.ts` with no replacement. The pre-change file was the gas-measurement utility that wrote `deployments/gas-benchmarks.json`, and the current `dualvm/scripts/` tree has no gas benchmark script at all, so the cleanup drops requested operational capability instead of migrating it away from Hardhat.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared service catalog still advertises legacy Hardhat commands even though this feature's purpose was to remove Hardhat entirely.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/kpa/polkadot/.factory/services.yaml:11-13` still contains `# Legacy Hardhat commands (will be removed after M11 hardhat-removal-foundry-cleanup)`, `test_hardhat`, and `build_hardhat`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library docs still describe Hardhat as an active dependency and validator flow, which is stale after the Foundry-only cleanup.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/kpa/polkadot/.factory/library/environment.md:33-34` lists `Hardhat with @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox` and `@parity/hardhat-polkadot for PVM compilation`; `/home/kpa/polkadot/.factory/library/user-testing.md:60-63` defines a `terminal-hardhat` flow with `npx hardhat compile` / `npx hardhat test`.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and current touched files for `hardhat-removal-foundry-cleanup`. Result: fail. The feature got the main config/test/CI migration mostly right, but it did not actually remove Hardhat from the committed npm install metadata and it deleted the gas benchmark ops script instead of preserving that requested tooling.
